title: REPORT ON CROSS VISIT DENMARK
subtitle: 30th November to 3rd December, 2015
description: A report summarizing a cross-visit in Denmark under the Horizon 2020 AgriSpin project, detailing four innovative agricultural cases including a chemical control app, SOP & LEAN methods, mini wetlands for nitrogen reduction, and SWAP pens for pig welfare. It analyzes the innovation processes, stakeholder networks, environmental and regulatory factors, and presents key findings and recommendations for supporting agricultural innovation.
